meaning: n.手榴弹兵,[军]精锐部队的士兵
examples: Yes he did, Grenadier Guards, I think.
Ben Kidney served in the Grenadier Guards.
He joined the second battalion of the Grenadier Guards.
His VC citation was read out at the Grenadier Guards barracks in Aldershot, Hampshire.
Capt Mike Dobbin, 28, of the Grenadier Guards, is among 118 people recognised in the latest military honours.
